summary:
package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.behavior; import java.util.stream.Collectors; public class ConservativeReasoningModule implements InstructionModule { @Override public String getInstructions(ExecutionPolicy policy) { if (policy.getReasoningStrategy() != ExecutionPolicy.ReasoningStrategy.CONSERVATIVE) { return ""; } StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.append("REASONING: CONSERVATIVE (Exploration Level: ").append(policy.getExplorationLevel()).append(")
") .append("→ Prioritize safety and minimal changes.
") .append("→ Avoid large-scale refactorings unless absolutely necessary.
") .append("→ Ensure all changes are well-tested and have low risk."); if (!policy.getConstraints().isEmpty()) { sb.append("
CONSTRAINTS:
") .append(policy.getConstraints().stream().map(c -> "→ " + c).collect(Collectors.joining("
"))); } return sb.toString(); } }
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
